meaning: Alif Lam Ra (special letters whose full meaning is known to Allah)
a book (that is أَنزَلْنٰهُ/We sent down)
we sent it down (referring to كِتٰبٌ - the Book)
to you (object of أَنزَلْنٰهُ - we sent it down)
so that you make (something) exit (to bring out الناس/the people)
the people (object of لِتُخْرِجَ - so you may bring out)
to the intense divine light (connected to إِلَى)
The Praiseworthy One (possessed by/connected to العَزِيزِ)
the one who/which (owns مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - what is in the heavens)
the heavens/skies (possessed by/belonging to what is mentioned after)
of the earth/ground/land (after فِى in the ayah)
for the ones who reject/cover up truth (connected to وَيْلٌ)
they prefer/choose (over something else) (subject of ٱلَّذِينَ)
and they seek it wrongfully (referring to crookedness in Allah's path)
crookedness (as the object being sought in يَبْغُونَهَا - they seek it)
those (referring to the disbelievers mentioned before who prefer worldly life)
in (shows they are in ضَلٰلٍۭ - misguidance)
a complete state of being lost (in this ayah: describing how far they have strayed)
and not/and what (connects to previous statement while introducing a negative)
from (connecting رَّسُولٍ to what comes before)
with/in the language (of قَوْمِهِۦ - his people)
so that he makes clear (to قَوْمِهِۦ - his people)
and so he leads astray (subject: اللَّهُ)
Moses (the prophet sent to free the Children of Israel)
from the many different kinds of darkness (object of مِنَ)
surely signs (connected to صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ - patient and grateful)
a very patient one (after preposition لِ)
and when (connecting to قَالَ - he said)
Moses (the one speaking to قَوْمِهِ/his people)
to/for his people (acted on by قَالَ)
from (connecting رَّبِّكُمْ 'your Lord' to what came before)
Pharaoh (object of مِّنْ ءَالِ - from the family of)
they afflict you all (referring to the Children of Israel)
your sons (being addressed to many people)
and they keep alive (actively) (the women of بْنَآءَكُمْ)
your women (referring to the women of the Israelites being addressed)
I will most certainly increase you all
Moses (the prophet who spoke these words)
all together (describing how you and everyone on Earth are being referred to in تَكْفُرُوا)
Allah (as the object being described as غَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌ - self-sufficient, praiseworthy)
he comes/arrives to you all (object of أَلَمْ - 'did not')
and Aad (possessed by قَوْمِ - people of)
and Thamud (connected to قَوْمِ نُوحٍ وَعَادٍ)
she came to them (referring to رُسُلُهُم their messengers)
so they rejected (in response to رُسُلُهُم their messengers)
indeed we (subject of كَفَرْنَا - we disbelieved)
we rejected/denied (what was sent to us)
with him/it (referring to ما/what in أُرْسِلْتُم/you were sent with)
in strong doubt (in relation to مِمَّا/about what)
from what (that you call us to)
Creator of (describes اللَّهِ as Creator of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
of the heavens (possessed by فاطِرِ - Creator/Originator)
so that he may forgive (purpose of يَدْعُوكُمْ - He calls you)
for you all (object of يَغْفِرَ - so that He may forgive for you)
and he postpones you all (with emphasis)
a specifically appointed time (referring to أَجَلٍ)
you all (subject of تُرِيدُونَ - you want)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
a human being (subject of إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا)
from what (that our forefathers used to worship)
he/it was (past tense verb that يَعْبُدُ describes)
with any clear authority/proof (that proves what we say)
she said (subject of رُسُلُهُمْ - their messengers)
we (emphasized, subject of قَالَتْ - they said)
except (connects بَشَرٌ 'humans' to what was said before)
Allah (as the object of يَمُنُّ - bestows favor)
he bestows favor (on مَن يَشَآءُ - whoever He wills)
upon/on (shows something is above or happening to something else)
he was (part of ما كَانَ - 'it was not')
for us/to us (referring to something being given or belonging to us)
that (connects to نَّأْتِيَكُم - we bring you)
we come/bring to you all (with emphasis)
then let him put trust (in اللَّهِ)
that not (introduces what we have no reason for)
and we will most certainly be patient
so let him put complete trust in
the ones who rely (deeply/thoroughly) (subject of فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ)
we will most definitely expel you all
you will most definitely return (threat from the disbelievers to their messengers)
then he revealed (to إِلَيْهِمْ - to them)
to/towards them (referring to رُسُلِهِمْ - their messengers)
and we will most definitely make you all live somewhere
the earth (object of نُسْكِنَنَّ - We will settle)
my place of standing (in relation to خَافَ - feared)
and they sought victory/judgment (followed by وَخَابَ)
stubborn (describing جَبَّارٍ and showing it follows it in grammar)
Hell (as the subject of يُسْقَىٰ - is given to drink)
and he is given drink (of مَّآءٍ صَدِيدٍ - putrid water)
he forces himself to gulp it (referring to the punishment mentioned earlier)
he almost does (describes يُسِيغُهُۥ - he swallows it)
he (subject of يَكَادُ - is about to)
the example or comparison (subject of كَرَمَادٍ)
their works/deeds (referring to those who disbelieved in their Lord)
in/within (connects يَوْمٍ to what came before)
they earned (referring to those who disbelieved in الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)
the wandering off (describes what something is)
the very distant (describes ٱلضَّلٰلُ - the misguidance)
you see (in أَلَمْ تَرَ - 'do you not see')
that (connects أَلَمْ تَرَ to what follows)
and the earth (object of خَلَقَ - created)
with/by the truth (object of created in خَلَقَ)
he causes you all to go away
that (pointing to something far and masculine)
with/by mighty/strong (in relation to عَلَى ٱللَّهِ - upon Allah)
then he said (introducing what the weak ones said to the arrogant ones)
they acted proudly (the leaders speaking to the weak followers)
for you all (followers of الَّذِينَ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوٓا۟)
and so/then is it? (connected to كُنَّا - we were)
you all (masculine plural, addressing the arrogant ones)
those who free from need (with emphasis)
we would have guided you all
did we panic? (contrasted with صَبَرْنَا - we were patient)
or (connecting two equal alternatives in a question)
we endured patiently (contrasted with panicking in أَجَزِعْنَآ)
from (away from عَذَابِ ٱللَّهِ - the punishment of Allah)
any place to move away to (after the word مِن)
and he said (subject of إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ)
he promised you all (subject of قَالَ)
of the truth (possessed by وَعْدَ - promise)
So I broke my promise to you all
to/for me (object of فَٱسْتَجَبْتُمْ - you responded)
upon you all (being addressed by الشَّيْطٰنُ)
then you all responded (to دَعَوْتُكُمْ - I called you)
to/for me (connects to استجبتم - you responded)
so do not (command to stop blaming me)
as your (all of you) helper (in response to وَمَآ أَنتُم)
and not (connected to بِمُصْرِخِكُمْ - your helper)
with my helper/rescuer (in response to أَنَا۠)
indeed I (speaking in the ayah: الشَّيْطٰنُ - Satan)
you all made me a partner
the people who act unfairly (acted on by إِنَّ)
for them (who will have عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ)
and was made to enter (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟)
they believed (connected to وَعَمِلُوا۟ - and they did)
and they did good deeds (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - they believed)
gardens (being entered into by الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا)
those who will remain forever (describes الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
their master who cares for them (referring to those who believed and did good deeds)
have not...? (expecting 'yes, it has' as answer)
an example (object of ضَرَبَ - set forth)
like a tree (being compared to كَلِمَةً طَيِّبَةً - a good word)
a very good, purely good (feminine form matching كَلِمَةً - word)
and its branch (in فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ - in the sky)
its fruit (object of تُؤْتِى - it gives)
a time/period (in كُلَّ حِينٍۭ - every time)
her Lord (referring to the good word/tree mentioned before)
and He presents/sets forth (subject of ٱللَّهُ)
perhaps they/so that they (connected to يَتَذَكَّرُونَ)
and an example (that describes كَلِمَةٍ خَبِيثَةٍ - an evil word)
like a tree (being compared to كَلِمَةٍ خَبِيثَةٍ - an evil word)
it (feminine) was forcefully uprooted (referring to كَلِمَةٍ خَبِيثَةٍ - evil word)
above (after مِن and connected to الأرض)
of the earth (possessed by فَوْقِ - above)
for it/it has (referring to the evil word كَلِمَةٍ خَبِيثَةٍ)
any firm foundation (of مَا لَهَا - what it has)
he makes very steady/firm (subject of يَفْعَلُ)
those who (referring to the believers mentioned in ءَامَنُوا۟)
they believed (those who اللَّهُ makes firm)
by the firm speech (connected to الثَّابِتِ)
of the firm, stable one (describes القول/the word)
the worldly life (as opposed to the afterlife)
the wrongdoers (who are misled by يُضِلُّ)
Allah (the one true God) (subject of يُثَبِّتُ - makes firm)
is it not true that... (expecting 'yes, it is true')
and they made (their people) settle (referring to قَوْمَهُمْ)
the ruin (object of دَارَ meaning 'home/abode of')
Hell (the object being entered in يَصْلَوْنَهَا - they will enter it)
and how terrible! (criticizing جَهَنَّمَ as a place to end up)
the place of settling/staying (subject of بِئْسَ - 'how evil is')
and they made/set (أَندَادًا rivals for/to اللَّهِ Allah)
so that they cause (others) to stray (from سَبِيلِهِۦ)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to عِبَادِىَ)
those who (describing the believers in ءَامَنُوا۟)
secretly (describes how something is done in يُنفِقُوا۟)
a day (that will come before لَّا بَيْعٌ فِيهِ - there will be no trading in it)
in it (referring to يَوْمٌ - that day)
the one who (subject of خَلَقَ - created)
and the earth (object of خَلَقَ - He created)
and he sent down (connected to خَلَقَ - he created)
water (as the object being sent down from the sky)
and then he brought out (connected to وَأَنزَلَ - and He sent down)
a provision (that Allah brought forth from fruits as sustenance)
surely for you all (connects to سَخَّرَ - subjected)
and he made (something) serve a purpose (connected to خَلَقَ)
for you all (connects to سَخَّرَ - subjected)
the ship (object of سَخَّرَ - subjected/made subservient)
so that it (the ship) may sail (by أَمْر - command of Allah)
by His command (referring to Allah's command making the ships sail)
and he forced to serve (the ships for you)
for you all (receivers of وَسَخَّرَ - He subjected)
and he forced into service (connected to previous statement)
for you all (object of سَخَّرَ - subjected)
two (that are) constantly moving (describing the sun and moon)
and He controlled/subjected (the sun and moon)
for you all (object of سَخَّرَ - subjected)
and the day (object of سَخَّرَ - subjected)
of all, of every (connected to مِّن before it)
you all asked for it (referring to everything Allah gave you)
you all can count it (referring to نِعْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ - Allah's favor)
indeed/truly/verily (introducing the statement: mankind is ungrateful)
the human (being acted upon in this ayah)
truly/indeed a very unjust one (describing الإنسان/mankind)
and when (connects to قَالَ - he said)
Ibrahim (as the subject who is speaking)
secure/safe (as a quality being given to the city)
and keep me away! (command from إِبْرٰهِيمُ to رَبِّ)
and my sons (part of Ibrahim's prayer)
the idols (object of نَّعْبُدَ - we worship)
O Lord! (calling out to the Lord)
indeed they (feminine plural, referring to idols)
they (feminine) made (many people) lose the way
many (acted upon by أَضْلَلْنَ - they led astray)
he followed me (connected to فَإِنَّهُۥ مِنِّى - then he is from me)
so indeed he (referring back to whoever follows)
from me (connected to فَمَن تَبِعَنِى - so whoever follows me)
One who is very forgiving (describing Allah)
Most Merciful (as an attribute of Allah)
in a valley (location where Abraham settled his family)
other than (describing ذِى زَرْعٍ - having cultivation)
possessor of, having (describing غَيْرِ - other than)
of the forbidden/sacred one (connected to بَيْتِكَ)
towards them (referring to the people mentioned in تَهْوِىٓ)
and provide them! (as a command to Allah)
perhaps they (referring to the people mentioned in بَيْتِكَ)
they are thankful (referring to people in general who might be grateful for Allah's blessings)
we hide (connected to نُعْلِنُ - we announce)
we make public (contrasts with نُخْفِى 'we hide' in this ayah)
and what/and not (connects to نُعْلِنُ - we announce)
he/it is hidden (something that happens to اللَّهِ)
from/of (connects شَىْءٍ to what comes before it)
and not (connecting to previous statement about what Allah knows)
in (connects ٱلْأَرْضِ with what comes before it)
of the sky, of the heaven (in ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ)
the one who (gave me Ismail and Isaac)
he gave (as a gift) (to لِى - to me)
despite (my old age in this ayah)
Ismail (the son of Prophet Ibrahim mentioned in this ayah)
of the (specific) act of calling out/praying
make me! (command to Allah in prayer)
and from (connects to ٱجْعَلْنِى - make me)
my offspring/descendants (speaking to Allah in prayer)
for me, to me (object of اغْفِرْ - forgive)
and for my parents (both of them)
on the day (when يَقُومُ ٱلْحِسَابُ - the reckoning stands)
he stands/will stand (when ٱلْحِسَابُ [the reckoning] occurs)
you definitely think/consider (after لا meaning 'do not')
Allah (as the object of تَحْسَبَنَّ - you think)
about what (that يَعْمَلُ the wrongdoers do)
he does/acts/works (subject of what the wrongdoers do)
the ones who do wrong (subject of يَعْمَلُ)
for a day (object of يُؤَخِّرُ - he delays)
she stares with eyes wide open
ones rushing forward with fixed gaze (describing multiple people)
their heads (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the ayah)
towards them (rushing with their heads raised up, referring to مُهْطِعِينَ)
an emptiness/void (referring to their hearts being completely empty of understanding)
the people (object of وَأَنذِرِ - and warn)
the day (when يَأْتِيهِمُ comes to them)
the punishment/torment (subject of يَأْتِيهِمُ - comes to them)
and then he says (connecting to يَأْتِيهِمُ - comes to them)
we will be responded to (to your call)
your call/invitation (object of نُّجِبْ - we will answer)
the messengers (object of وَنَتَّبِعِ - and we will follow)
those who (describing the people who wronged themselves)
and it became very clear (by itself)
how (asking about the way فَعَلْنَا was done)
we did (referring to what was done to those who wronged themselves)
and we set forth (acted on الْأَمْثَالَ)
and definitely (connects to مَكَرُوا۟ - they plotted)
their plot (object of مَكَرُوا - they plotted)
so that it/she moves away (referring to الْجِبَالُ - the mountains)
from it (referring to مَكْرُهُمْ - their plan)
the mountains (subject of لِتَزُولَ - to be moved/cease)
and then not (connects to تَحْسَبَنَّ - think)
one who breaks/fails to fulfill (the subject of تَحْسَبَنَّ)
His promise (that Allah will not break)
His messengers (being acted upon by مُخْلِفَ)
Allah (the one true God who is being denied by the disbelievers in مُخْلِفَ)
on the Day (when تُبَدَّلُ will be changed)
it is being completely changed (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
the earth (subject of تُبَدَّلُ - is changed)
other than (describes what is being changed in يَوْمَ تُبَدَّلُ - the Day when will be changed)
and they emerged/appeared openly (before لِلَّهِ - to Allah)
on that day (when the criminals will be bound together)
those who are firmly bound together
in the chains (describing مُّقَرَّنِينَ - those bound)
and she/it covers/overwhelms (and the fire covers)
Allah (the one true God who is the subject of يَجْزِىَ - He rewards)
that which (emphatic, connects 'every soul' to what it 'earned')
indeed/verily (emphasizing that اللَّهَ سَرِيعُ ٱلْحِسَابِ - Allah is swift in reckoning)
Allah (as the object being acted upon by يَجْزِىَ - rewards/recompenses)
of the reckoning (possessed by سَرِيعُ - swift)
and so that they may be warned (connected to بَلٰغٌ)
and so that they may know
that indeed (connects to هُوَ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ - He is One God)
he/it (referring to the message/بَلٰغٌ mentioned before)
and so that he remembers/is reminded intensively
of the minds/intellects (referring to people of understanding)
